  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Combustible materials are located within the 35-foot (11-meter) hot work safety zone without being covered or protected by fire-resistant shields."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately.",
    "Relocate all combustibles at least 35 feet away from the hot work area, or cover them with approved welding blankets/pads.",
    "Establish a dedicated fire watch with appropriate extinguishing equipment."
  ],
  "rationale": "Performing hot work with unprotected combustibles within the 35-foot radius violates fundamental fire prevention standards, posing an immediate fire hazard to the facility and personnel.",
  "references": [
    "NFPA 51B Chapter 5",
    "OSHA 1926.352"
  ]
}
